# `legal_app/backend/prompts.py`

_Python module_

## Overview

System prompts for AG Lex.

Kept in its own module so legal review / prompt iteration doesn't churn
`claude_client.py`. Strings are deliberately byte-stable — changing them
invalidates the prompt cache for every existing session.

_No functions defined at the top level._
